steps.title: Connect sculpture and history
steps.content: The goal is to connect Save Me to the history of neon in art. The relevant notes say neon became popular with artists in the 1960s and remains popular today.

steps.title: Place it in the lineage
steps.content: A focuses on advertising and hand production, C gives neon history without connecting it to the sculpture, and D wrongly says neon's artistic popularity has declined. The matching choice connects Stanton's sculpture to artists using neon since the 1960s. The answer is B.
